summary_text: {"risk":"MEDIUM","approve":false,"findings":["No code, PR, or diff is provided for the Happy mobile auth-stale recovery work, so the implementation cannot be reviewed for correctness or security.","The required local kernel orchestration runs (codex main, claude assist local-direct Max20, glm baseline reviewer) are mentioned but no logs or artifacts confirm they occurred.","The issue asks to ensure happy-web auth-stale recovery smoke stays green, yet no test reports or screenshots are attached.","Residual external-only validation is referenced but not described, leaving unclear work before final sign-off."],"recommendation":"Share the actual code/PR plus the three requested orchestration logs, attach the latest happy-web auth-stale smoke report, and enumerate any remaining external-only validation steps so reviewers can verify completion.","rationale":"Authentication recovery changes are inherently sensitive, and without code or verification evidence the stated tasks cannot be validated, so approval must be withheld until the missing artifacts are supplied."}
